bone-white.$description: Bone White — Primary text, nav links, button labels, footer copy — the only light on the page, used for everything that must be read

slate-dark.$description: Slate Dark — Page canvas, base surface for all cards and sections

graphite.$description: Graphite — Elevated surface — nested cards, button hover fills, secondary panels sitting on top of Slate Dark

fog.$description: Fog — Secondary text, metadata labels, inactive nav items, muted descriptions

ash.$description: Ash — Tertiary text, timestamps, low-priority labels

charcoal.$description: Charcoal — Outlined button borders, icon strokes on dark surfaces

indigo-dusk.$description: Indigo Dusk — Violet supporting accent for decorative details and low-frequency emphasis

replica-regular.$description: Primary typeface for all body text, headings, navigation, and the hero display. The single weight (400) is the signature — no bold, no light, just one confident regular cut. The tight -0.014em tracking throughout gives geometric letters a slightly condensed, deliberate feel. Used at every size from 14px captions to the 120px+ hero mural.

replica-mono.$description: Reserved for metadata and structural labels: year markers, project tags (Art Direction, Branding, Design Systems), and small heading-like elements. Creates a clear typographic separation between content (Replica-Regular) and structural scaffolding (Replica-Mono).

arial.$description: Arial — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Page background, the base layer everything sits on

card.$description: Surface level 1: Elevated content containers — project cards, bio blocks, nested panels

highlight.$description: Surface level 2: Status pills and active state surfaces
